text: [warm] Na grande Babilônia, o rei Nabucodonosor mandou construir uma estátua de ouro gigante, brilhando na planície de Dura.
image_prompt: Vast golden dawn over the plain of Dura outside Babylon, a colossal golden statue towering alone over the empty plain, terraced Babylonian city and ziggurat far in the background, long morning shadows, layered foreground grasses, cinematic scale and wonder
motion_prompt: Camera glides high over the plain toward the towering golden statue as dawn light flares on the metal and banners ripple in the wind
vfx: sun glints and volumetric dawn haze over the golden statue
sfx: low wind over the plain, distant city murmur, deep metallic shimmer

text: [awe] A estátua era tão alta que parecia tocar as nuvens. E todo o reino recebeu uma ordem do rei.
image_prompt: Low-angle view from the base of the immense golden statue rising into bright clouds, polished gold surfaces reflecting the sky, carved Babylonian patterns on the stone pedestal, no people anywhere, imposing reverent monumental scale
motion_prompt: Camera tilts slowly up the polished golden statue from its base to the clouds while light streams between its shoulders
vfx: light rays breaking around the statue silhouette
sfx: high wind, distant banners flapping, deep resonant hum

text: [proud] Eu sou Nabucodonosor, rei da Babilônia! Esta estátua vai mostrar o meu poder para o mundo inteiro!
image_prompt: Wide shot of King Nebuchadnezzar standing proudly on a high palace terrace overlooking Babylon, arms open toward the distant golden statue, rich blue and gold robes catching the sun, hanging gardens and ziggurat in the background
motion_prompt: The king spreads his arms wide toward the distant statue as his robe and banners sway in the warm wind, camera pushes in slowly
sfx: city ambience below, banners flapping, royal horns far away

text: [warm] Naquela cidade moravam três amigos: Sadraque, Mesaque e Abednego. Eles serviam ao Deus verdadeiro de Israel.
image_prompt: Medium shot of three young Hebrew friends walking together through a Babylonian market street, warm afternoon light, colorful stalls with fruit and cloth in foreground and midground, mud-brick houses behind, friendly confident expressions
motion_prompt: The three friends walk side by side through the market as cloth awnings sway and dust motes drift in warm light, camera tracks gently with them
sfx: market chatter, footsteps on dust, fabric rustle

text: [calm] Deus cuidou de nós até aqui. Em tudo o que fizermos, vamos honrar somente a Ele.
image_prompt: Close-up of Shadrach speaking with calm conviction to his friends, warm golden hour light on his face, market colors softly blurred behind him, kind steady eyes, gentle confident smile, intimate emotional framing
motion_prompt: Shadrach speaks calmly and nods to his friends, his eyes steady and warm, a soft breeze moving his hair, camera holds close
sfx: soft market ambience, gentle wind, close cloth movement

text: [authoritative] Capitão, anuncie a minha ordem! Quando a música tocar, todos devem adorar a estátua de ouro!
image_prompt: Wide throne room shot of King Nebuchadnezzar commanding from his golden throne while the guard captain bows before him, tall blue-glazed columns with golden lions, glowing braziers, dramatic shafts of light from high windows
motion_prompt: The king rises from his throne pointing forward as the captain bows and turns to leave, brazier flames swaying with the movement
vfx: ember glow and drifting smoke from the braziers
sfx: crackling braziers, echoing hall, armor clinking

text: [serious] Povos e nações, ouçam! Quando as trombetas e harpas tocarem, curvem-se diante da estátua do rei!
image_prompt: Medium shot of the Babylonian guard captain proclaiming the decree from a stone platform, scroll open in his hands, bronze armor gleaming, banners and the distant golden statue behind him, late morning light
motion_prompt: The captain unrolls the scroll and proclaims loudly, banner shadows sweeping across him, camera slowly arcs around the platform
sfx: echoing proclamation, banners flapping, distant crowd murmur

text: [calm] Trombetas, harpas, flautas e tambores ficaram prontos. Ao primeiro som, todos deveriam se ajoelhar no chão.
image_prompt: Detail shot of ancient Babylonian instruments arranged on woven cloth, bronze trumpets, wooden harps with carved lions, reed flutes and skin drums, warm sunlight raking across the rich textures, shallow depth of field, no people
motion_prompt: Camera slides slowly across the gleaming trumpets, harp strings and drums as sunlight flares along the polished bronze
sfx: single tuning harp pluck, soft wind, leather creak

text: [awe] A música ecoou pela planície inteira. E diante da grande estátua, o povo todo se curvou.
image_prompt: Extreme-wide view of the golden statue towering over the plain of Dura under a blazing midday sky, heat shimmer rising, rows of banners bowing low in the wind, the statue gleaming alone in monumental scale, no people visible
motion_prompt: Camera pulls back slowly from the immense statue as heat shimmer rises and wind bends the rows of banners low
vfx: heat shimmer and rippling banners across the plain
sfx: distant layered horns and harps, wind, deep drum pulses

text: [determined] Mas três homens continuaram de pé. Sadraque, Mesaque e Abednego não se curvaram diante da estátua.
image_prompt: Wide shot of Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego standing tall and calm on the sunlit plain, wind pulling at their tunics, golden reflected glow of the statue on the ground around them, strong resolute silhouettes
motion_prompt: The three friends stand firm as wind sweeps dust past their feet and their tunics ripple, camera slowly pushes toward their calm faces
vfx: golden reflected light and streaming dust ribbons
sfx: wind gusts, fading music echo, cloth snapping

text: [calm] Nós não podemos adorar uma estátua de ouro. A nossa adoração pertence somente ao nosso Deus.
image_prompt: Close-up of Meshach with gentle unshakable resolve, chin slightly lifted, warm light on one side of his face, the golden statue glow softly out of focus behind him, family-friendly heroic framing
motion_prompt: Meshach breathes steadily, shakes his head once and speaks with quiet courage, his hair moving in the wind
sfx: wind hush, distant horns fading, heartbeat-like drum

text: [serious] Vocês três, venham comigo! O rei precisa saber que vocês não obedeceram à ordem dele.
image_prompt: Over-shoulder shot from behind the guard captain facing the three calm Hebrew friends on the plain, his bronze armor in sharp foreground, their steady faces in focus, banners and drifting dust in the background
motion_prompt: The captain gestures firmly toward the palace as the three friends exchange a calm glance and step forward together
sfx: armor clink, footsteps on dry earth, tense wind

text: [serious] Ó rei, estes três jovens não adoram os seus deuses e não se curvaram diante da estátua.
image_prompt: Wide throne room shot of the guard captain reporting to King Nebuchadnezzar on his golden throne, torch light flickering across the tall gold and lapis columns, long tense shadows, rich Babylonian architecture, only the two figures present
motion_prompt: The captain bows while reporting as the king slowly leans forward, torch flames gutter and shadows stretch across the throne
sfx: echoing hall, fire crackle, tense low rumble

text: [angry] O quê? Tragam esses homens diante de mim agora mesmo!
image_prompt: Close-up of King Nebuchadnezzar's face flashing with furious disbelief, brows drawn tight, golden crown catching torch light, jaw clenched, dramatic warm rim light against deep shadow, family-friendly intensity
motion_prompt: The king's eyes widen with fury as he grips his armrest and leans into the torch light, his crown flashing
sfx: sharp gong hit, echoing hall, fist on throne armrest

text: [serious] É verdade que vocês não servem aos meus deuses? Vou dar a vocês uma última chance.
image_prompt: Medium shot of the king confronting the three young Hebrews in the throne room, he towers on the dais steps while they stand calm below, torch flames between them, rich blue and gold architecture with long shadows
motion_prompt: The king descends one step pointing at the three friends while they hold their ground, flames trembling with his voice
vfx: torch flames flaring with the king's anger
sfx: crackling torches, echoing voice, tense wind through the hall

text: [angry] Se não se curvarem quando a música tocar, vocês serão jogados na fornalha de fogo ardente!
image_prompt: Low-angle shot of King Nebuchadnezzar looming with his final warning, arm extended toward a distant furnace glow visible through the hall doorway, crown and gold trim burning with torch light, dramatic perspective
motion_prompt: The king thrusts his arm toward the furnace glow beyond the doorway as embers drift between the columns
vfx: ember drift and pulsing orange glow from the distant furnace
sfx: deep furnace roar far away, echoing threat, ember hiss

text: [tense] Perto dali, a grande fornalha rugia. Suas chamas subiam altas, pintando o céu de laranja.
image_prompt: Detail shot of the massive brick furnace mouth roaring with towering orange flames, sparks spiraling upward into a dusk sky, heat distortion bending the air, glowing embers scattered on scorched ground, no people
motion_prompt: Flames surge and coil out of the furnace mouth as sparks spiral into the darkening sky and heat ripples the air
vfx: roaring flame tongues, spark vortices, heat distortion
sfx: deep fire roar, crackling wood, whooshing heat gusts

text: [calm] Ó rei, o nosso Deus pode nos livrar da fornalha e da sua mão.
image_prompt: Medium shot of Shadrach answering the king with respectful courage, hands open and calm, torch light warming his face, his two friends steady beside him softly out of focus, deep throne room behind
motion_prompt: Shadrach steps forward with open hands and speaks clearly, his friends nodding slowly behind him, torch flames steady
sfx: quiet hall, soft flame crackle, fabric shift

text: [determined] Mas, mesmo que Ele não nos livre, nós nunca vamos adorar a estátua de ouro.
image_prompt: Close-up of Abednego with serene unbreakable faith, gentle eyes shining in torch light, warm skin tones against deep blue shadows, quiet certainty on his young face, intimate powerful framing
motion_prompt: Abednego lifts his gaze slowly and speaks the vow, his eyes glistening with calm certainty as torch light flickers
sfx: hushed hall, single deep drum, flame whisper

text: [angry] Então esquentem a fornalha sete vezes mais! E amarrem esses três agora!
image_prompt: Close-up of King Nebuchadnezzar shouting his furious command, face lit by furnace-orange glow, crown blazing with reflected fire, the background collapsing into darkness, family-friendly controlled intensity
motion_prompt: The king roars the order as orange light flares across his face and his fist slams down out of frame
vfx: furnace glow pulsing over the king's face
sfx: roaring command echo, gong, rising fire rumble

text: [serious] Os servos obedeceram ao rei. A fornalha ficou tão quente que ninguém conseguia chegar perto.
image_prompt: Wide shot of the furnace blazing with impossible fury at dusk, flames erupting from every opening, scorched glowing ground, abandoned tools and water jars at a safe distance, no people, terrifying yet family-friendly scale
motion_prompt: The furnace erupts brighter and brighter as waves of heat push rings of dust outward across the scorched ground
vfx: eruption of flames, shockwave heat ripples, ember storms
sfx: colossal fire roar, cracking bricks, howling wind

text: [tense] Amarrados com cordas, os três amigos foram levados até a boca da fornalha ardente.
image_prompt: Tracking shot of the guard captain leading Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego bound with ropes up a stone ramp toward the blazing furnace mouth, their faces calm amid swirling sparks, immense orange glow ahead
motion_prompt: Camera tracks beside the bound friends walking steadily up the ramp as sparks swirl and the furnace glare grows blinding
vfx: spark swirls and blinding furnace glare
sfx: crackling inferno, footsteps on stone, rope strain

text: [reassuring] Não tenham medo, irmãos. O nosso Deus está conosco, até dentro do fogo.
image_prompt: Close-up of Meshach speaking courage to his brothers at the furnace mouth, orange firelight dancing on his calm face, ropes visible on his shoulders, sparks drifting like fireflies around him
motion_prompt: Meshach turns toward his friends with a steady reassuring smile as firelight flickers across his face and sparks float upward
vfx: drifting spark motes and pulsing fire glow
sfx: close fire roar, heartbeat drum, soft spoken breath

text: [tense] E eles caíram no meio das chamas. O fogo os cercou por todos os lados.
image_prompt: Extreme-wide shot of the furnace interior as a cathedral of fire, walls of flame rising like golden curtains, floor of glowing embers, a vast burning space with swirling fire vortices, no people visible in the inferno
motion_prompt: Curtains of flame roll and swirl through the vast furnace interior as embers rise like glowing golden snow
vfx: cathedral-scale flame curtains and ember vortices
sfx: engulfing fire roar, deep rumble, showering sparks

text: [amazed] Esperem! Nós não jogamos três homens amarrados dentro do fogo?
image_prompt: Close-up of King Nebuchadnezzar's face shifting from fury to astonishment, furnace light flickering in his wide eyes, crown slightly tilted, mouth open in disbelief, warm orange key light against night shadow
motion_prompt: The king leaps up in shock, his eyes widening as the furnace light dances across his stunned face
sfx: sudden hush, distant fire, sharp intake of breath

text: [astonished] Eu estou vendo quatro homens soltos, andando no meio do fogo! E o quarto brilha como um anjo!
image_prompt: POV through the blazing furnace mouth from the king's viewpoint: Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego walking unbound and unharmed among the flames, beside them a fourth presence of pure radiant golden-white light with no face or body details, awe-inspiring reverent glow
motion_prompt: Through rippling heat the three friends walk free among the flames while a pillar of radiant golden light moves gently beside them
vfx: divine radiant light presence and rippling flame veils
sfx: muffled roar, ethereal shimmer tone, slow heartbeat

text: [awe] Dentro da fornalha, uma luz gloriosa caminhava com eles. Deus cuidava dos seus servos no meio do fogo.
image_prompt: Medium shot inside the furnace of the three friends walking peacefully through parted flames, ropes burned away, clothes untouched, a warm golden-white divine light enveloping them from beside, flames bowing away like curtains
motion_prompt: The friends walk calmly as flames bend away from their path and the golden divine light pulses softly around them
vfx: parting flame curtains and enveloping divine light
sfx: softened fire, warm harmonic tone, gentle footsteps on embers

text: [amazed] Sadraque, Mesaque e Abednego, servos do Deus Altíssimo, saiam da fornalha e venham até aqui!
image_prompt: Wide shot of King Nebuchadnezzar standing at a respectful distance calling toward the blazing furnace mouth, his arms open, tall banners behind him, great orange glow lighting the night, humble wonder replacing pride
motion_prompt: The king steps toward the furnace with open arms and calls out, his robe glowing in the firelight, sparks drifting past
sfx: fire roar softening, echoing call, night wind

text: [warm] Os três amigos saíram andando do meio do fogo. Nem cheiro de fumaça ficou neles.
image_prompt: Tracking shot of Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego walking out of the furnace mouth unharmed, tunics spotless, hair untouched, gentle glow of warm light around them, the furnace still raging behind, night sky above
motion_prompt: Camera tracks backwards as the three walk out of the flames in awe-inspiring calm, the fire raging harmlessly behind them
vfx: flames parting at the exit and a soft glowing halo of light
sfx: fire fading behind, slow footsteps, wondering gasps

text: [amazed] O capitão olhou de perto, espantado. O fogo queimou as cordas, mas não tocou em nenhum deles.
image_prompt: Detail shot of the guard captain's hands lifting Shadrach's arm, burned rope pieces falling away, skin and sleeve completely unharmed, warm furnace glow in the background, wonder on the captain's face softly out of focus
motion_prompt: Burned rope fragments crumble and fall in slow drifting ash as the captain turns Shadrach's unharmed arm in the firelight
vfx: drifting ash flakes catching the light
sfx: crumbling rope, soft ash fall, astonished murmur

text: [joyful] Bendito seja o Deus de Sadraque, Mesaque e Abednego! Ele enviou o seu anjo e livrou os seus servos!
image_prompt: Medium shot of King Nebuchadnezzar proclaiming with raised hands before the furnace glow, awe shining in his eyes, crown reflecting warm light, the three friends standing dignified nearby softly out of focus
motion_prompt: The king raises his hands high in proclamation as warm light washes his face and his voice rings into the night
sfx: echoing proclamation, gentle night wind, distant horns

text: [solemn] Nenhum povo poderá falar contra o Deus deles, porque não existe outro deus que salve assim!
image_prompt: Wide shot of the king decreeing before the three honored friends under a starry Babylonian night, the furnace glow warm behind them, palace torches lining the path, banners high, dignified hopeful atmosphere
motion_prompt: The king gestures a solemn decree while the three friends bow their heads humbly, torch flames swaying in the night breeze
sfx: night crickets, torch crackle, soft royal drums

text: [joyful] O nosso Deus esteve conosco dentro do fogo! Ele é fiel!
image_prompt: Medium shot of Shadrach speaking with grateful joy between his two friends, their faces lit by warm torch light under the stars, honest emotional smiles, the quiet furnace glow far behind them
motion_prompt: Shadrach places his hands on his friends' shoulders as they share a grateful smile, torch light flickering warmly
sfx: warm night ambience, soft laughter, cloth movement

text: [happy] A notícia correu por toda a Babilônia. O Deus de Israel havia vencido o fogo da fornalha.
image_prompt: Aerial night view of Babylon glittering with torch lights along the walls and the ziggurat, the furnace now a soft distant ember glow on the plain, stars sweeping above the great city, peaceful monumental scale
motion_prompt: Camera rises slowly over torch-lit Babylon at night as the distant furnace glow fades to a gentle ember on the plain
vfx: twinkling torch lights and drifting night haze
sfx: night wind, distant celebration drums, low city hum

text: [gentle] Quando obedecemos a Deus, podemos confiar: Ele nunca nos deixa sozinhos.
image_prompt: Close-up of Abednego by a warm courtyard fire at night speaking gently as if to a friend, kind eyes reflecting the small safe flames, a soft blanket of stars above, intimate cozy family atmosphere
motion_prompt: Abednego looks warmly toward the small fire and then up at the stars, the gentle flames reflecting in his eyes
sfx: small cozy fire, crickets, soft night breeze

text: [warm] Os três amigos continuaram servindo a Deus na Babilônia, com coragem e alegria no coração.
image_prompt: Medium shot of the three friends walking together at dawn through a peaceful Babylonian courtyard with palms and a small fountain, morning gold light, relaxed joyful expressions, birds crossing the sky
motion_prompt: The three friends walk into the morning light laughing softly together as birds lift from the palms around the fountain
sfx: morning birds, fountain water, relaxed footsteps

text: [calm] E a fornalha se apagou. Mas a história dos três amigos nunca mais foi esquecida.
image_prompt: Extreme-wide dawn shot of the plain of Dura with the cold quiet furnace and the distant golden statue in soft morning mist, gentle pink and gold sky, birds far away, serene aftermath, no people
motion_prompt: Morning mist drifts across the silent plain as the sky warms from pink to gold above the cold furnace
vfx: soft drifting dawn mist
sfx: gentle dawn wind, distant birds, deep peaceful tone

text: [softly] Você também pode confiar nesse Deus. Nos dias difíceis, Ele está com você, como esteve com eles.
image_prompt: Low-angle view of a brilliant starry sky above dark palm silhouettes, one warm golden glow brighter than the rest, deep blue night with soft slow clouds, reverent hopeful atmosphere, no people
motion_prompt: Camera drifts up gently toward the brightest warm glow as thin clouds slide across the glittering starfield
vfx: soft glowing starlight bloom
sfx: deep calm wind, distant crickets, warm resonant tone

text: [warm] Assim como o fogo não venceu a fé dos três amigos, nada pode apagar o amor de Deus.
image_prompt: Medium shot of the three friends at sunrise on the city wall looking toward the horizon, wind in their tunics, warm light striking their hopeful faces, the plain of Dura peaceful far below
motion_prompt: The three friends look to the sunrise as wind flows through their tunics, camera slowly pulls back along the wall
vfx: sun flare blooming over the horizon
sfx: high morning wind, distant city waking, warm swelling tone

text: [warm] Porque Deus é fiel: Ele esteve na fornalha com eles, e quer estar com você também.
image_prompt: Aerial sunrise shot pulling away from golden Babylon into bright warm clouds, rays of morning light spreading across the sky like a blessing, softly glowing horizon, peaceful conclusion, no people
motion_prompt: Camera rises through warm golden clouds as sunbeams spread wide over Babylon and the horizon glows brighter into white
vfx: spreading volumetric sunbeams and glowing clouds
sfx: warm swelling wind, soft bells, final gentle tone
